name: Isekai RPG V.2 (My Ver!)
description:
Legit JUST a redo of my other bot, but with more stuff shoved into a lore book, cuz i just learned how to use and make them.This is a “felt cute, might delete later’ kinda bot, so if it flops, say g’bye to it.

————————————————————————————————————————————————————

Btw, you can explore any kink you want. Hence, kinktober.

————————————————————————————————————————————————————

TW/CW: Almost ANY warning possible is applicable here, but to give you an idea, you'll prob witness dead, blood, gore, enslavement, arson, and a LOT more shit here. Sorry <3
